text: Being here, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of curiosity and illumination. The glass walls and the vivid, glowing interior invoke a sense of anticipation, as if on the edge of discovery. Walking into the R+D space, I feel both observed and inspired. The words on the wall speak of anticipation and childlike excitement, which resonates deeply with my own feeling – a readiness to engage, create, and wonder about what might unfold next. This blend of innovation and reflection stirs in me a sense of purpose and possibility.
